info.title: C# REPL
info.description: A dotnet global tool for a command line C# REPL with syntax highlighting. Explore the language, libraries and NuGet packages interactively.

options.name: --reference
options.description: Reference assemblies, nuget packages, and csproj files. Can be specified multiple times.

options.name: --using
options.description: Add using statement. Can be specified multiple times.

options.name: --framework
options.description:
Reference a shared framework.
Available shared frameworks:
- Microsoft.NETCore.App (default)
- Microsoft.AspNetCore.App

options.name: --theme
options.description:
Read a theme file for syntax highlighting. Respects the NO_COLOR standard.
Available default themes:
- themes/VisualStudio_Dark.json (default)
- themes/VisualStudio_BlueExtraContrast.json
- themes/VisualStudio_Light.json
- themes/dracula.json

options.name: --useTerminalPaletteTheme
options.description: Uses terminal palette colors for syntax highlighting. Respects the NO_COLOR standard.

options.name: --prompt
options.description: Formatted prompt string.

options.name: --useUnicode
options.description: Use UTF8 output encoding and unicode character decorations (requires terminal support).

options.name: --usePrereleaseNugets
options.description: Allows prerelease NuGet versions when searching for the latest package version.

options.name: --streamPipedInput
options.description: If input is piped via stdin, evaluate it line by line instead of in one batch.

options.name: --tabSize
options.description: Width of tab character.

options.name: --culture
options.description:
Culture to use for access to the MSDN documentation. Defaults to the current culture.
Key Bindings

options.name: --triggerCompletionListKeys
options.description: Key binding to trigger the completion list. Can be specified multiple times.

options.name: --newLineKeys
options.description: Key binding to insert a newline character. Can be specified multiple times.

options.name: --submitPromptKeys
options.description: Key binding to submit the prompt. Can be specified multiple times.

options.name: --submitPromptDetailedKeys
options.description:
Key binding to submit the prompt with detailed output. Can be specified multiple times.
Open AI

options.name: --openAIApiKey
options.description: OpenAI API key. Alternatively, set the OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable.

options.name: --openAIPrompt
options.description: OpenAI prompt to prefix to all code submissions

options.name: --openAIModel
options.description: OpenAI model configuration

options.name: --openAIHistoryCount
options.description:
Maximum number of previous REPL entries to send to OpenAI as context.
Help and Diagnostics

options.name: --trace
options.description:
Produce a trace file in the current directory, for CSharpRepl bug reports.
-v or --version:                            Show version number and exit.
-h or --help:                               Show this help and exit.
@response-file.rsp:
A file, with extension .rsp, containing the above command line [OPTIONS], one option per line.
Command line options will also be loaded from <path>
Run 'csharprepl --configure' to launch this file in your editor.
script-file.csx:
A file, with extension .csx, containing lines of C# to evaluate before starting the REPL.
Arguments to this script can be passed as <additional-arguments> and will be available in a global `args` variable.
